title: Deglazed Savory Korean Chicken Skewers
description: Savory and snappy Korean dish featuring chicken skewers deglazed with a sweet and spicy sauce, served with a side of unique ice cream

ingredients.name: Ice cream
ingredients.notes: unique flavor such as sesame or ginger

instructions: Preheat the robata-grill to medium-high heat
Thread the chicken pieces onto skewers
In a small bowl, whisk together gochujang, soy sauce, brown sugar, garlic, and ginger
Brush the sauce onto the chicken skewers
Grill the skewers for 5 minutes per side, or until cooked through
Deglaze the grill with the remaining sauce, scraping up any browned bits
Serve the skewers with a side of unique ice cream
Drizzle the deglazed sauce over the top of the skewers and ice cream
